query: SELECT r1.name FROM registrations r1 WHERE r1.meetupId = 510001 AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM registrations r2 WHERE r2.meetupId IS NULL AND r2.passportOcrData IS NOT NULL AND r2.name = r1.name);
